descriptionEn: Avocado is a high-value fruit crop widely grown in Rwanda and East Africa. Proper disease management ensures healthy fruit for local markets and export.
Mango trees produce nutritious fruit but are vulnerable to fungal and pest-related diseases that reduce yield and quality.
Citrus crops like orange are essential for nutrition and income. Early disease detection protects both tree health and fruit marketability.
Onions are a staple crop in East African kitchens. Leaf diseases can spread quickly in humid conditions and reduce bulb quality.
Carrots require careful foliar disease management to produce straight, healthy roots suitable for fresh markets and restaurants.
descriptionRw: Karoti isaba gucunga neza indwara z\

descriptionEn: Tomatoes are one of the most scanned crops on AGRIC AI. Early blight, late blight, and viral diseases can devastate yields if not caught early.
descriptionRw: Inyanya ni kimwe mu bihingwa byinshi gusuzumwa kuri AGRIC AI. Indwara nka blight na virus zishobora kwangiza umusaruro niba zitamenwe vuba.

descriptionEn: Potatoes are a key food security crop. Late blight is the most destructive disease and requires immediate action when detected.
Cassava is drought-tolerant and vital for food security, but mosaic disease and root rot can significantly reduce harvests.
descriptionRw: Imyumbati ihanganira amapfa kandi ingenzi mu biribwa, ariko indwara nka mosaic na root rot zishobora kugabanya umusaruro.

descriptionEn: Forest and timber trees support biodiversity and livelihoods. Leaf spot and blight diseases can weaken stands and reduce timber value.
Tea is a major export crop in East Africa. Blister blight and root diseases can reduce leaf quality and processing yields.
Coffee supports millions of smallholder farmers. Leaf rust and berry diseases directly impact bean quality and farmer income.
Maize is a staple food crop across Africa. Gray leaf spot, common rust, and blight can cause significant yield losses.
Beans provide essential protein for millions. Angular leaf spot and rust are common and detectable with AGRIC AI scanning.
descriptionRw: Ibishyimbo bitanga poroteyine ku miliyoni. Angular leaf spot na rust ni indwara zisanzwe kandi zishobora gusuzumwa na AGRIC AI.
